name: Bat MVVM simplification — reduce src LoC and add unit tests, gated on typecheck + tests

description: Baseline: 12197 LoC src, 448 unit tests, 105 files

asi.hypothesis: establish baseline complexity_score = src_loc - 4*unit_tests

description: Try EmptyState extraction across 11 sites — regressed (overhead > savings)

asi.hypothesis: extract <EmptyState> component to remove 6-line duplicated JSX in 11 call sites
asi.next_action_hint: the abstraction overhead (33-line component) outweighed the per-site savings (~3 lines × 11 sites). Could be salvaged if combined with adding tests for EmptyState behavior, but unit-testing JSX components without React Testing Library isn't available. Skip and pursue other wins.

description: Fix: parsePortParam wire-semantics regression — restore 404 fall-through for out-of-range integer ports + 5 route-level regression tests

asi.hypothesis: fix wire-semantics regression: parsePortParam was rejecting out-of-range integers (0, 65536, negative) with 400, but the pre-refactor route only rejected non-integers and let out-of-range ints fall through to the 404 'not found in allowlist' response. Revert range check; add 5 route-level regression tests pinning both the 400 path (non-numeric) and the 404 fall-through path (out-of-range).
